headline.line2: We can still define the boundary of judgment.

brandHero.subtitle: BufferLine makes that boundary visible.
brandHero.description: By connecting observation (JDVP), extraction (Thinkprint), and governance (Meta Governance), BufferLine turns judgment shifts into an operable system.

system.title: Three independent domains, one Cognitive OS
system.description: BufferLine is the umbrella brand. JDVP, Thinkprint, and Meta Governance are independent domains under it. Each can run alone or connect as one system.
system.coreRuleDescription: Domains stay independent by design, then connect through shared governance and evidence loops.

jdvp.title: JDVP
jdvp.subtitle: Observation protocol
jdvp.description: Measures judgment movement with Judgment State Vectors and Delegation Vectors in human-AI workflows. Runs independently and interoperates with other domains.

thinkprint.title: Thinkprint
thinkprint.subtitle: Extraction protocol
thinkprint.description: Externalizes reasoning patterns into inspectable, shareable modes. Runs independently and combines with JDVP for richer calibration.

metagovernance.title: Meta Governance
metagovernance.subtitle: Authority architecture
metagovernance.description: Designs how authority emerges, flows, and stabilizes across agents and humans. Operates independently and is strongest with JDVP plus Thinkprint.
